text: the quiet ones are always listening
some thoughts only surface after midnight
darkness is just another kind of room
the world is smaller when nobody's watching
silence has its own frequency
the best ideas arrive uninvited
the morning hasn't made up its mind yet
first light is always a rough draft
the sky rehearses before anyone notices
something is beginning whether you're ready or not
even the sun takes a moment to arrive
the air remembers yesterday but chooses today
coffee understands what words cannot
the day is still soft enough to shape
mornings are for the ones who almost gave up last night
the light is being generous right now
somewhere a window just opened
everything is provisional until noon
the sun doesn't apologize for being direct
clarity is overrated until you have it
the middle of the day has no patience for ambiguity
shadows are shortest when you stop running
some truths only work in full light
the day's spine is showing
the afternoon is where plans go to become memories
time moves differently after lunch
the light is starting to pick favorites
patience is just attention with nowhere to go
the second half is always more honest
momentum has its own quiet sound
everything looks better in this light
the world is briefly in agreement
this is the hour that photographers trust
the light is leaving a note for tomorrow
beauty has a deadline and it's almost here
everything gold is borrowed
the sky can't decide and that's the point
endings always look better from a distance
the in-between is where the interesting things live
dusk is the world's rough draft of night
something is leaving and something is arriving
the horizon is just a suggestion
the day is folding itself into memory
lamps know something that daylight forgot
the evening doesn't ask what you accomplished
windows glow brighter when the world goes dark
rest is not the opposite of progress
the night shift of the mind is clocking in
